standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per anchor-qualified summary target

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patient-level identifier used to search future ICU stays
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: ICU stay identifier and target retained key

database_mapping.source_grain: one row per MIMIC ICU stay
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained row per MIMIC ICU stay with a nullable observed future ICU admission duration

summary_build_translation.window_start_translation: start at icu_icustays.outtime for the current ICU stay
summary_build_translation.window_end_translation: end at the intime of the first later ICU stay observed for the same subject_id
summary_build_translation.qualifying_row_translation: every icu_icustays row with subject_id and stay_id is a candidate retained ICU stay row; rows with missing current outtime retain an unresolved status
summary_build_translation.selection_translation: sort ICU stays by subject_id, intime, and stay_id; for each current stay, select the first later row for the same subject with intime strictly greater than current outtime
summary_build_translation.aggregation_translation: compute (next_later_intime - current_outtime) in days and round half away from zero to 3 decimal places
summary_build_translation.tie_break_translation: after enforcing strict post-discharge timing, use stable ordering by intime then stay_id for candidate future ICU stays
summary_build_translation.no_source_row_translation: do not synthesize ICU stays outside icu_icustays; retain the source ICU stay row with null duration when no later ICU stay is observed
summary_build_translation.partial_window_translation: missing current outtime produces unresolved_missing_outtime; missing future ICU stay means the retained value is null, not zero

validation_contract.no_source_row_policy_check: ICU stays are the target source rows; no additional null target rows are synthesized outside icu_icustays
validation_contract.window_consistency_action: exclude overlapping, same-boundary, self-match, or nonpositive-gap candidates from the retained next-ICU match
notes: The retained target grain is ICU stay, not hospital admission encounter.
The retained duration is computed from current ICU outtime to the first later ICU intime for the same subject.
The retained value may be null; status values distinguish no later observed ICU stay from unresolved missing current outtime.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint reads this mapping spec and delegates to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_days_to_next_icu_admission outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side scripts or ad hoc rebuilds.
